title: MBSE HSSLC/ 12th Class 2025 Exam Time Table

detail.short_info: Mizoram Board of School Education (MBSE) has Released Exam Time Table for HSSLC/ 12th Class 2025.

content.text: Name of the Post: MBSE HSSLC/ 12th Class 2025 Exam Time Table Released
Brief Information: Mizoram Board of School Education (MBSE) has Released Exam Time Table for HSSLC/ 12th Class 2025. Appeared candidates can check their Exam Date at below link…

items.label: Important Dates
items.text: Date of Exam: 14-02-2025 to 17-03-2025 Date of Practical Exam: 03-02-2025

seo_tags: MBSE HSSLC/ 12th Class Exam Date 2025 - Exam Time Table Released
